MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Vacated

Plaintiff Sophiane Benaouda'S Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court'S Order To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Sophiane Benaouda's Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court's Order To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case IS Off calendar. Judge Kahn issued an order on January 31, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Sophiane Benaouda'S Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court'S Order To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Continued To Feb-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court'S Order To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: inna zatulovsky, esq., 415.932.6934, for plaintiff sophiane benaouda.
peter maretz, esq., stokes roberts & wagner, 619.237.0909, for defendant khrg monaco sf, llc.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PLAINTIFF SOPHIANE BENAOUDA'S Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court's Order To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Case UNDER SUBMISSION. (counsel for both parties shall each prepare a form of order and email to court). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb; Petition; Req For Judicial Ntc; Ntc Of Lodgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter B. Maretz, Esq. of Stokes, Roberts & Wagner, Tel. 619.232.4261, appearing for defendant and moving party via court call.
Inna Zatulovsky, Esq. of Zatulovsky Law Office, Tel. 415.932.6934, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KHRG MONACO SF, LLC's Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Mtn To Stay Action Until Arb Occurs
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter B. Maretz, Esq. of Stokes, Roberts & Wagner, Tel. 619.232.4261, appearing for defendant and moving party via court call.
Inna Zatulovsky, Esq. of Zatulovsky Law Office, Tel. 415.932.6934, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KHRG MONACO SF, LLC's Motion To Stay Action Until Arbitration Occurs is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
